title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 447.100 - Carrier's responsibility ceases, when
text:
447.100.  Carrier's responsibility ceases, when. — After the storage of goods, merchandise or property as herein provided, the responsibility of the carrier shall cease, nor shall the person with whom the same may be stored be liable for any loss or damage on account thereof, unless the same shall result from his negligence or want of proper care.
(RSMo 1939 § 15326) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14236; 1919 § 7296; 1909 § 8277
